errors.description: The timestamp anchor is missing a canonical proof bundle hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until proof bundle hash continuity is present

errors.description: The timestamp anchor payload is malformed or does not match canonical payload generation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until canonical timestamp payload integrity is proven

errors.description: The timestamp anchor does not contain a valid UTC timestamp.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until UTC timestamp semantics are valid

errors.description: The timestamp anchor cannot be verified against its hash, validation status, or proof bundle.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until anchor continuity is verified

errors.description: The timestamp anchor contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp verification until diagnostics contain no secrets or raw approvals
